ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., contributor, maintainer, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the user */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role FOREIGN KEY ("user_role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_metrics" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "author_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the user's influence or activity */,
  "in_degree" INTEGER /* Number of incoming connections (in-degree) */,
  "out_degree" INTEGER /* Number of outgoing connections (out-degree) */,
  "clustering_coeff" REAL /* Clustering coefficient of the user in the network */,
  "module_flow" REAL /* Module flow metric indicating the user's contribution to specific modules */,
  "page_rank" REAL /* PageRank of the user in the network */,
  "eigenvector_centrality" REAL /* Eigenvector centrality of the user */,
  "betweenness_centrality" REAL /* Betweenness centrality of the user */,
  "closeness_centrality" REAL /* Closeness centrality of the user */,
  "hub_score" REAL /* Hub score of the user */,
  "authority_score" REAL /* Authority score of the user */,
  "k_core" INTEGER /* k-core of the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography or short description of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests or areas of expertise of the user */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level of the user (e.g., beginner, intermediate, expert) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user's profile is verified */,
  "public_contributions" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user's contributions are public */,
  "public_metrics" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user's metrics are public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "comm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication event */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the communication */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, message) */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the communication */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the communication */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the communication has been read */,
  "replied_to_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the communication ID if this is a reply */,
  "forwarded_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the communication ID if this was forwarded */,
  "attachment_url" TEXT /* URL of any attachments */,
  "communication_medium" TEXT /* Medium of communication (e.g., email, chat, forum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintainer responsible for the module */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the module was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the module */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the current version */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of module dependencies */,
  "contributor_count" INTEGER /* Number of contributors to the module */,
  "issue_count" INTEGER /* Number of open issues for the module */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit to the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the contribution */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the contribution is related to */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., patch, review, documentation) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the contribution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the contribution */,
  "merge_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was merged */,
  "pull_request_url" TEXT /* URL of the pull request */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash if applicable */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the impact of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_module_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the module */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., maintainer, contributor) */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date of the association */,
  "association_status" TEXT /* Status of the association (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contribution to the module */,
  "contribution_count" INTEGER /* Number of contributions made by the user to the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_module_associations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_module_associations_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cluster was first identified */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the cluster was last updated */,
  "modularity" REAL /* Modularity of the cluster */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Number of users in the cluster */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of users in the cluster */,
  "average_in_degree" REAL /* Average in-degree of users in the cluster */,
  "average_out_degree" REAL /* Average out-degree of users in the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_cluster_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the cluster */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date of the association */,
  "association_status" TEXT /* Status of the association (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "contribution_count" INTEGER /* Number of contributions made by the user within the cluster */,
  "communication_count" INTEGER /* Number of communications made by the user within the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cluster_associations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cluster_associations_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES network_clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_evolution" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the evolution record */,
  "network_metric" TEXT /* Network metric being tracked (e.g., average clustering coefficient, average in-degree) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the network metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., clustering, degree, centrality) */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cluster if the metric is cluster-specific */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module if the metric is module-specific */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_evolution_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES network_clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_evolution_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "default_role" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the default role for new users */,
  "editable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role can be edited by administrators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
